stories.title: Sabalenka Crushes Krejcikova 6-2, 6-3 in Rome Opener

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: No. 1 Sabalenka opened Rome in style. 6-2, 6-3 over Grand Slam champion Krejcikova in 84 minutes. 26 winners. Broke back immediately after losing game one. She's 28-1 in 2026. #ItalianOpen #WTA #Sabalenka #TennisTwitter

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Sabalenka has won 8 of her last 9 matches against Krejcikova. The 6-2, 6-3 Rome opener makes it nine. Next up: Cirstea in R3. Still chasing her first Rome title in 8 appearances. #ItalianOpen #Sabalenka #WTA #TennisTwitter

article.headline: Sabalenka Crushes Krejcikova 6-2, 6-3 in Dominant Rome Opener

stories.title: Paolini Survives Scare to Begin Rome Title Defense

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: 57 unforced errors. 54 winners. One tiebreak loss. And Jasmine Paolini is through to R3. That's defending champion energy. 6-7(4), 6-2, 6-4 over Jeanjean in nearly 3 hours. #ItalianOpen #WTA #Paolini #TennisTwitter

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Paolini's Rome defense is alive. She lost the first set, made 57 errors, fought for nearly 3 hours — and still won 6-7(4), 6-2, 6-4. Defending Rome champion doesn't go quietly. Next: Mertens. #ItalianOpen #WTA #TennisTwitter

article.headline: Paolini Survives Scare to Begin Rome Title Defense: 57 Errors, 54 Winners, and Through to R3

stories.title: Swiatek Returns to Clay With Dominant Rome Win Over McNally

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Swiatek is back. 6-2, 6-3 over McNally on Rome clay. No rust, no virus hangover. Roland Garros is 17 days away and the four-time champion is moving. #ItalianOpen #Swiatek #WTA #TennisTwitter

stories.title: Djokovic and Sinner Enter Rome Tonight — The Heavyweights Take the Stage

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Tonight in Rome: Djokovic vs. Prizmic (6-time champ's first clay match since March) and Sinner vs. Ofner (28-match M1000 streak). The two biggest names in men's tennis finally show up. #ATPTour #ItalianOpen #Sinner #Djokovic

stories.title: Sinner's Career Golden Masters Quest — Rome Is the Last Piece

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Jannik Sinner has won Masters 1000 titles at 8 of the 9 events. Rome is the last piece. A title here = Career Golden Masters, joining only Djokovic. No Italian has won Rome since 1976. #Sinner #ItalianOpen #ATPTour #TennisTwitter

article.headline: The Last Piece: Sinner Needs Rome to Complete the Career Golden Masters
